<Model>
  <!--SQUASH-->
  <Command Name="squash" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="StewardEF.Commands.SquashMigrationsCommand" 
Settings="StewardEF.Commands.SquashMigrationsCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Squashes EF migrations into the first migration.</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Argument Name="MigrationsDirectory" Position="0" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
      <Option Short="t" Long="target" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
      <Option Short="y" Long="year" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.Nullable`1[[System.Int32, System.Private.CoreLib, 
Version=8.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=7cec85d7bea7798e]]" />
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="squash" />
      <Example commandLine="path/to/migrations" />
      <Example commandLine="squash" />
      <Example commandLine="path/to/migrations" />
      <Example commandLine="-y" />
      <Example commandLine="2023" />
      <Example commandLine="squash" />
      <Example commandLine="path/to/migrations" />
      <Example commandLine="-t" />
      <Example commandLine="20230615000000_AddUserTable" />
      <Example commandLine="squash" />
      <Example commandLine="path/to/migrations" />
      <Example commandLine="-t" />
      <Example commandLine="AddUserTable" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
  <!--CONVERT-TO-SQL-->
  <Command Name="convert-to-sql" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="StewardEF.Commands.ConvertToSqlCommand" 
Settings="StewardEF.Commands.ConvertToSqlCommand+Settings">
    <Description>Converts a migration to use SQL scripts instead of C# 
code.</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Argument Name="MigrationsDirectory" Position="0" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
      <Option Short="m" Long="migration" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
      <Option Short="p" Long="project" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String" />
    </Parameters>
    <Examples>
      <Example commandLine="convert-to-sql" />
      <Example commandLine="path/to/migrations" />
      <Example commandLine="convert-to-sql" />
      <Example commandLine="path/to/migrations" />
      <Example commandLine="-p" />
      <Example commandLine="path/to/Project.csproj" />
      <Example commandLine="convert-to-sql" />
      <Example commandLine="path/to/migrations" />
      <Example commandLine="-m" />
      <Example commandLine="AddUserTable" />
    </Examples>
  </Command>
</Model>
